fields.name: robots
fields.label: Robots
fields.description: e.g. index, follow or noindex, nofollow

fields.name: target
fields.label: Adobe Target
fields.description: Enable Target personalization on this page (use only for active experiments)

fields.name: analytics
fields.label: Adobe Analytics
fields.description: Auto page view via Web SDK (default on when unset)

fields.name: adventureCategory
fields.label: Adventure category
fields.description: Primary activity interest for audience segments (eVar4). Leave empty to infer from URL.

fields.name: journeyStage
fields.label: Journey stage
fields.description: Visitor intent for audience segments (prop3). Leave empty to infer from URL.

fields.name: b2b-api
fields.label: B2B API URL
fields.description: Cloudflare Worker or Edge Function base URL for B2B dashboard

fields.name: name
fields.label: Section Name
fields.description: Label shown in the content tree

fields.name: youtubeUrl
fields.label: YouTube URL
fields.description: Full youtube.com or youtu.be link

fields.name: basic
fields.label: Use the Edit Form Properties extension to configure Adaptive Form properties, including Submit Action, Prefill, and Thank-You options.
fields.description: Visit https://www.adobe.com/go/learn_aemforms_cs_properties_ext for more details.
